race.comment: This is tough. REWARD THE SHERIFF (9) missed a whisker this track and trip first-up and then found a 62 at over 1000m at Bendigo too much of a stretch. Rates highly and can bounce back. Is proven third up and can bounce back on his home track. MELODEE ROSE (11) missed a nose over 900m at Corowa and then began awkwardly beaten 2.2L at Yarra Valley. Has claims in this lineup with average luck in the run. WAREO ROAD (2) resumes with Coffey booked and has jumped out well at Bendigo. Has an awkward gate but has jumped out well at Bendigo, and he ran his best number this course/distance. BIMBALLA (8) won her Maiden here a month ago over this trip, and that stacks up. Will do on for a top barn, but has the outside gate, and that will require good management. THE WAYFARER (4) just missed at Edenhope and then raced wide throughout here. Draws better for this, and he's in the mix.
